Command.Name: daemon
Command.Description: Daemon management. The daemon holds Excel sessions across CLI invocations.

Command.Name: start
Command.Description: Start the daemon in the background.

Command.Name: stop
Command.Description: Stop the daemon.

Command.Name: status
Command.Description: Show daemon status and active sessions.

Command.Name: session
Command.Description: Session management. WORKFLOW: open -> use sessionId -> close (--save to persist).

Command.Name: create
Command.Description: Create a new Excel file, open it, and create a session.

Argument.Name: FILE
Argument.Description: Path to the new Excel file to create

Command.Name: open
Command.Description: Open an Excel file and create a session.

Argument.Name: FILE
Argument.Description: Path to the Excel file to open

Command.Name: close
Command.Description: Close a session. Use --save to persist changes.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: List active sessions.

Command.Name: save
Command.Description: Save a session without closing it.

Command.Name: sheet
Command.Description: Worksheet operations. Actions: list, create, rename, copy, delete, move, copy-to-file, move-to-file, set-tab-color, get-tab-color, clear-tab-color, hide, very-hide, show, get-visibility, set-visibility.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (e.g., list, create, rename, delete, copy, move)

Option.Description: Hex color for tab color (e.g., #FFD966). Overrides --red/--green/--blue if provided.
Target worksheet name for copy operation

Command.Name: range
Command.Description: Range operations. Actions: get-values, set-values, get-formulas, set-formulas, get-number-formats, set-number-format, set-number-formats, clear-all, clear-contents, clear-formats, copy, copy-values, copy-formulas, get-used-range, get-current-region, get-info, insert-cells, delete-cells, insert-rows, delete-rows, insert-columns, delete-columns, find, replace, sort, get-style, set-style, format-range, validate-range, get-validation, remove-validation, auto-fit-columns, auto-fit-rows, merge-cells, unmerge-cells, get-merge-info, add-hyperlink, remove-hyperlink, list-hyperlinks, get-hyperlink, set-cell-lock, get-cell-lock.

Command.Name: table
Command.Description: Table operations. Actions: list, read, create, rename, delete, resize, set-style, toggle-totals, set-column-total, append, get-data, add-to-datamodel, create-from-dax, update-dax, get-dax.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (e.g., list, create, read, append)

Option.Description: Read CSV data from file instead of command line
DAX query for create-from-dax or update-dax
Read DAX query from file instead of command line
Comma-separated or JSON array of filter values
Structured reference region (All, Data, Headers, Totals)
Sort columns JSON for multi-column sort
Get only visible data (excludes filtered rows)

Command.Name: powerquery
Command.Description: Power Query operations. Actions: list, view, refresh, delete, get-load-config, create, update, rename, refresh-all, load-to, unload, evaluate.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (e.g., list, view, create, update, refresh, evaluate)

Option.Description: Load destination: worksheet, data-model, both, connection-only
Read M code from file instead of command line

Command.Name: pivottable
Command.Description: PivotTable operations. Actions: list, read, create-from-range, create-from-table, create-from-datamodel, delete, refresh.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (e.g., list, create-from-range, refresh)

Option.Description: Aggregation function (Sum, Count, Average, Max, Min, etc.)
Date grouping interval (Days, Months, Quarters, Years)
Comma-separated or JSON array of values for filter
Source table name for PivotTable creation

Command.Name: chart
Command.Description: Chart operations. Actions: list, read, create-from-range, create-from-table, create-from-pivottable, delete, move, fit-to-range.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (e.g., list, read, create-from-range, delete)

Command.Name: chartconfig
Command.Description: Chart configuration. Actions: set-source-range, add-series, remove-series, set-chart-type, set-title, set-axis-title, get-axis-number-format, set-axis-number-format, show-legend, set-style, set-placement, set-data-labels, get-axis-scale, set-axis-scale, get-gridlines, set-gridlines, set-series-format, list-trendlines, add-trendline, delete-trendline, set-trendline.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (e.g., set-title, add-series, set-data-labels)

Option.Description: Legend position (Top, Bottom, Left, Right, Corner)
Show category name in data labels
Show series name in data labels

Command.Name: connection
Command.Description: Connection operations. Actions: list, view, create, test, refresh, delete, load-to, get-properties, set-properties.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (e.g., list, view, create, refresh)

Option.Description: Read SQL command from file instead of command line
Read connection string from file instead of command line
Load destination: worksheet, data-model, both, connection-only
Target cell address for data load

Command.Name: namedrange
Command.Description: Named range operations. Actions: list, read, write, create, update, delete.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (list, read, write, create, update, delete)

Option.Description: Scope named range to specific worksheet
Value to write to named range

Command.Name: conditionalformat
Command.Description: Conditional formatting. Actions: add-rule, clear-rules.

Option.Description: Format style to apply when rule matches
Read formula from file instead of command line

Command.Name: vba
Command.Description: VBA operations. Actions: list, view, import, delete, run, update.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (e.g., list, view, import, run, update, delete)

Option.Description: VBA code to import or update
Read VBA code from file instead of command line

Command.Name: datamodel
Command.Description: Data Model operations. Actions: list-tables, read-table, list-columns, list-measures, read, create-measure, update-measure, delete-measure, rename-table, delete-table, read-info, refresh, evaluate, execute-dmv.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (e.g., list-tables, create-measure, evaluate)

Option.Description: Read DAX query from file instead of command line
Read DMV query from file instead of command line
Read DAX formula from file instead of command line

Command.Name: datamodelrel
Command.Description: Data Model relationship operations. Actions: list-relationships, read-relationship, create-relationship, update-relationship, delete-relationship.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (e.g., list-relationships, create-relationship)

Option.Description: Set relationship as active (default: true). Use --active false for inactive.
Column in from-table that links to to-table
Source (many-side) table name containing the foreign key
Column in to-table that from-column links to (usually primary key)
Target (one-side/lookup) table name containing the primary key

Command.Name: slicer
Command.Description: Slicer operations. Actions: create-slicer, list-slicers, set-slicer-selection, delete-slicer, create-table-slicer, list-table-slicers, set-table-slicer-selection, delete-table-slicer.

Argument.Name: ACTION
Argument.Description: The action to perform (e.g., create-slicer, list-slicers, set-slicer-selection)

Option.Description: Table column name for table slicer
Table name for table slicer source
